title: RELONGGI 70cm Cat Rope Toy with Catnip & Silvervine - Interactive Dental Chew Toy for Teeth Cleaning - Cotton Cat Toy for Cats & Kittens (Purple, 1-Pack)
features: CAT CHEW ROPE FOR TEETH CLEANING: This catnip toy for indoor cats is made of cotton rope that is soaked in peppermint water. When your cat scratches, chews, grinds, bites, touches, kicks or hugs the soft cotton rope catnip chew toy, it can effectively protect your cat's gum health, clean teeth, promote digestion and prevent hairballs. No wire inside, safe to use

SELF ENTERTAINING, QUIET CATNIP TOYS: If you have a lot of cat worries, such as noisy squeaky cat toys at night, interactive kitten toys that need companionship, complaining about the cat climbing frame, and cat scratching boards to deal with all the clutter, this quiet, self-entertaining cat toys will be the perfect choice for you. No noise, the indoor cat kicking cat toy won't damage your furniture and will never take up your precious companionship time

COLORFUL KITTEN CATNIP TOYS: The size of chew toys for cats is up to 23.6 inch. The shape，color and size of cat chew toy are thought fully designed to facilitate easy for the kitties to grasp, toss, chase and chew，making it convenient to use and carry, allowing cats to enjoy the fun indoor or outdoor. Cat cotton rope toy is suitable for cats of all ages & breeds

ITE-RESISTANT CHEW TOYS FOR CATS: Cat dental toys included silvervine fruit pique your cat's curiosity and interest, making playtime more enjoyable, increasing their activity levels, and keeping kittens away from your broom, slippers, cable

BEST GIFT FOR CATS & OWNERS: Kitten teething toys can also help with chewing, separation anxiety, teething, boredom, weight control, running training and more. Your kitten will be strongly attracted to react with chewing, rubbing, licking, rolling and running. very cute. A for sure winner for kitties. Great fun to watch them play
